# Primary Care and Beyond

> Telehealth direct primary care, functional medicine, and medical weight care for adults (18+) across Florida, provided by Elizabeth Hanke, APRN, FNP-BC. Membership is $150/month with transparent, published pricing. This is a direct health care membership, not insurance.

## About
- Provider: Elizabeth Hanke, APRN, FNP-BC, an autonomous Florida nurse practitioner and the practice founder.
- Delivery: telehealth statewide in Florida. Patients must be physically located in Florida during each visit. Adults 18 and older.
- Legal model: a direct health care agreement under Fla. Stat. 624.27. Not insurance and not minimum essential coverage under the ACA.
- In-person care in Sarasota and Lakewood Ranch is planned but not yet open.

## Services and pricing
- Primary care membership: $150 per month. Includes one telehealth primary care visit per week when needed, preventive care, chronic condition support, women's health, prescriptions and refills for non-controlled medications, lab orders when medically indicated, medical weight care, GLP-1 medication management when appropriate, care coordination, and messaging between visits.
- Functional medicine: available without a primary care membership, billed per visit and quoted before care. Initial consultation $375 (90 minutes), follow-up $200 (30 minutes), extended follow-up $300 (60 minutes), lab review $150.
- Weight care: included for primary care members when appropriate, and also available as a standalone service with a written estimate before care begins.
- You always know the price before care begins. A written estimate is provided before any functional medicine or standalone weight care.

## Not included
- Emergency, urgent, after-hours, and hospital care; specialist, lab, imaging, and pharmacy fees; controlled substances; hormone therapy (not currently offered); in-person procedures; and disability, employment, or legal form completion.

## Contact
- Phone: 941.250.6561
- Email: Elizabeth@primarycareandbeyond.com
- Website (English): https://www.primarycareandbeyond.com
- Website (Spanish): https://www.primarycareandbeyond.com/es/
- Now accepting new patients.
